languages.original_text: {n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the Cult Mechanicus? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."

languages.text: {n}Его улыбку сложно прочитать.{/n} "Интересный вопрос. Отвечу на него другим вопросом: смог бы я рассказать о подобной встрече мирян{mf|ину|ке}, не нарушив обеты, данные {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Культу Механикус{/g}? Этот вопрос не требует ответа, это лишь пища для размышлений".

{n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the Cult Mechanicus? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."

languages.text: {n}Muestra una sonrisa enigmática.{/n} «Una cuestión interesante. Responderé con otra pregunta: ¿sería posible hablar a un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a} de tal encuentro sin quebrantar mis juramentos al {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Culto Mechanicus{/g}? No requiere respuesta, pero me gustaría que tuviera esto en mente».
languages.original_text: {n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."

traits.locale_text: {n}Muestra una sonrisa enigmática.{/n} «Una cuestión interesante. Responderé con otra pregunta: ¿sería posible hablar a un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a} de tal encuentro sin quebrantar mis juramentos al {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Culto Mechanicus{/g}? No requiere respuesta, pero me gustaría que tuviera esto en mente».

languages.text: {n}他露出意味深长的微笑。{/n}“这个问题很有意思。让我用另一个问题来回答：我能否在不违背对{g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}机械修会{/g}誓言的情况下，向一个教外人士讲述这样的遭遇？这个问题不需要回答，只是供您思考。”
languages.original_text: {n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."

traits.locale_text: {n}他露出意味深长的微笑。{/n}“这个问题很有意思。让我用另一个问题来回答：我能否在不违背对{g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}机械修会{/g}誓言的情况下，向一个教外人士讲述这样的遭遇？这个问题不需要回答，只是供您思考。”

languages.text: {n}Son sourire est une énigme.{/n} « Une question fort intéressante. Je vous répondrai par une autre : serais-je en mesure d'avouer une telle rencontre à {mf|un|une} profane sans briser mon serment envers le {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Culte Mechanicus{/g} ? Je n'attends pas de réponse, mais je vous laisse y réfléchir. »
languages.original_text: {n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."

traits.locale_text: {n}Son sourire est une énigme.{/n} « Une question fort intéressante. Je vous répondrai par une autre : serais-je en mesure d'avouer une telle rencontre à {mf|un|une} profane sans briser mon serment envers le {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Culte Mechanicus{/g} ? Je n'attends pas de réponse, mais je vous laisse y réfléchir. »

languages.text: {n}Er lächelt hintergründig.{/n} "Eine interessante Frage. Ich beantworte sie mit einer Gegenfrage: Könnte ich einem Laien von einer derartigen Begegnung erzählen, ohne meine Eide gegenüber dem {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Kult Mechanicus{/g} zu brechen? Diese Frage bedarf keiner Antwort ... sie soll nur zum Denken anregen."
languages.original_text: {n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."

traits.locale_text: {n}Er lächelt hintergründig.{/n} "Eine interessante Frage. Ich beantworte sie mit einer Gegenfrage: Könnte ich einem Laien von einer derartigen Begegnung erzählen, ohne meine Eide gegenüber dem {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Kult Mechanicus{/g} zu brechen? Diese Frage bedarf keiner Antwort ... sie soll nur zum Denken anregen."

languages.text: {n}彼の笑顔は謎めいている。{/n}「興味深い質問だ。カルト・メカニカスへの誓いを破ることなく、そのような出会いを素人に話すことができるだろうか？この質問には答えは必要ない。」
languages.original_text: {n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."

traits.locale_text: {n}彼の笑顔は謎めいている。{/n}「興味深い質問だ。カルト・メカニカスへの誓いを破ることなく、そのような出会いを素人に話すことができるだろうか？この質問には答えは必要ない。」

languages.text: {n}Esrarengiz bir gülümseme takınıyor.{/n} "İlginç bir soru. Buna bir başka soruyla cevap vereceğim: {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus'a{/g} verdiğim yeminleri bozmadıkça Avama böyle bir karşılaşmayı anlatabilir miydim? Cevap vermeye gerek yok. Düşünsel bir soru."
languages.original_text: {n}His smile is enigmatic.{/n} "An interesting question. I will answer it with another: would I be able to tell a layperson of such an encounter, without breaking my vows to the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}? This question does not require an answer — just food for thought."
